name: Apify

composio_registry_match.name: Apify
composio_registry_match.description: Apify is a platform for building, deploying, and managing web scraping and automation tools, known as Actors.

description: A cloud platform for deploying serverless web scraping and automation Actors, offering proxy, storage, and AI-agent integration tools.
notes: Apify provides a comprehensive REST API and official MCP server support for AI agents. Authentication is performed via personal API tokens.
